Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Good work, Commander. In addition to the SM-1MR missiles, USS Gallery is also equipped with the
. This is an over-the-horizon anti-ship missile that can be used against ships and surfaced submarines. It is the primary anti-ship weapon used by the USN.
Another target drone has been identified. Designate this drone to Harpoon following the same procedure we used for firing SM-1MR.

Note: Harpoon uses an active radar seeker. This means it can be decoyed by chaff, or mistakenly target larger radar returns than your intended target (such as large civilian merchant ships). In congested waters, use of Harpoon can be difficult due to this and Standard should be used instead!
